title: bgTestBulletHitBackground texture_s/texture_t always -1 vs retail backward DL-scan derivation

evidence.path: src/game/bg.c GLOBAL_ASM bgTestBulletHitBackground tail 7F0B7D2C-7F0B7D5C: after the nearest-hit is chosen it walks backward from the hit DL pointer at output+0x24 to the previous G_SETTIMG (0xF5) command and derives output+0x2c = tex_byte1 shifted right 5 and output+0x2e = tex_word0 shifted left 11 then right 30 (logical). The NATIVE_PORT path at bg.c:13415 hardcodes both output+0x2c and output+0x2e to -1 because the native bgTestLineIntersectionInRoom (audit rank 240, waived) does not populate the N64 DL pointer at output+0x24.

history.evidence: src/game/bg.c GLOBAL_ASM bgTestBulletHitBackground tail 7F0B7D2C-7F0B7D5C: after the nearest-hit is chosen it walks backward from the hit DL pointer at output+0x24 to the previous G_SETTIMG (0xF5) command and derives output+0x2c = tex_byte1 shifted right 5 and output+0x2e = tex_word0 shifted left 11 then right 30 (logical). The NATIVE_PORT path at bg.c:13415 hardcodes both output+0x2c and output+0x2e to -1 because the native bgTestLineIntersectionInRoom (audit rank 240, waived) does not populate the N64 DL pointer at output+0x24.
history.note: S5 ASM audit batch 21 rank 256. Core nearest-hit algorithm (bbox cull bgTestLineIntersectsBbox, room-line test, dist_sq with the 4-unit light bias, best-distance field copy) matches retail instruction-for-instruction. Only the texture_s and texture_t surface-coordinate fields diverge: retail computes them from the impact surface DL command, port returns -1. Downstream of the rank-240 native-BgHitRecord reimpl. Retest with a room-line collision oracle.
